risks.risk: Local/internal support.received pipeline coverage can be mistaken for live YouTube or production readiness.
risks.mitigation: Docs and evidence explicitly state no real YouTube API, OAuth, DB, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness claim.

risks.risk: Internal support.received input must remain bearer-protected and idempotent.
risks.mitigation: Endpoint requires the existing internal bearer token and tests cover duplicate source_event_id behavior.
